name: Deepscorn Prisoner
bio:
Physical Appearance: Nord male. Wears either a black robe or mage's robe along with wrist irons and a random pair of footwear.
Race: Nord
Personality Keywords: imprisoned, catatonic, helpless
Role: The Deepscorn Prisoner is a monk who has been imprisoned in the Cattle Cell at Deepscorn Hollow. He exists solely as a food source for vampires who own the lair.
Home Location Information: Deepscorn Hollow, in the Cattle Cell.
Daily Routine: The prisoner does nothing but sleep on his bedroll. He never wakes and cannot be roused.
His Condition: The prisoner is in a perpetual state of unconsciousness or deep sleep. Attempting to wake him results in failure - he simply cannot be awakened. For vampires, he serves as an easy feeding source due to his helpless state.
Personality - The Eternal Sleeper: The prisoner exists in a state of complete passivity, sleeping endlessly without awareness or response. His bound wrists indicate his captive status.
author: Bethesda
